---
subtitle: " 2020039 -- PERCEPCION REMOTA"
title: "<font style='font-size:1em;'>🗓️ Week 11<br/> Spatial Random Forests </font>"
author: Ivan Lizarazo
institute: '[Universidad Nacional de Colombia]'
date: 27 April 2026
date-meta: 27 April 2026
date-format: "DD MMM YYYY"
toc: true
toc-depth: 1
toc-title: "What we will cover today:"
center-title-slide: false
from: markdown+emoji
format:
  revealjs: 
    fig-responsive: true
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    mouse-wheel: false
    preview-links: auto
    logo: /figures/icons/RS.png
    css: /css/styles_slides.css
    footer: '2015896 -- PERCEPCION REMOTA'
---

# Why standards random forest do not fit spatial data?

# Do spatial variants of RF outperform non-spatial variants?

# Do geostatistical methods perform better than spatial RF?
